title: [FIRRTL][Dedup] Fix DontTouch annotation handling
body:
When we dedup modules, we combine the annotations from both. Since DontTouch is a sticky annotation and there is no point in having more than one, we tried to only keep one copy of the `DontTouch` annotation. This logic did not take into account that the annotation might be targeting a specific field of an aggregate, and could end up deduplicating the `DontTouch` annotations which targeted different fields.

This PR uses a set of annotations to take into account the `fieldID` of the annotations.  It also started ripping out the `circt.nonlocal` field from any `DontTouch` annotation, which has no effect on the annotation, and just hurts our ability to deduplicate these annotations.
